title: DeletePhantoms
description: DeletePhantoms completely removes phantoms from Minecraft by preventing spawns and erasing any that appear.
body:
# DeletePhantoms

**DeletePhantoms** is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that **completely eliminates phantoms from your server**.

Unlike solutions that only block phantom spawning, DeletePhantoms **removes phantoms whenever and however they appear**, including:
- Natural insomnia spawns
- Phantoms loaded with chunks
- Command- or plugin-spawned phantoms
- Edge cases that bypass gamerules

If a phantom exists, this plugin deletes it.

DeletePhantoms is designed to be **minimal, fast, and safe**, with **no gameplay side effects** and **no noticeable performance impact**.  
It does exactly one thing, and it does it reliably.

---

## Why DeletePhantoms?
🛑 **Not just spawn prevention**

Many plugins and gamerules only stop *new* phantom spawns.  
DeletePhantoms actively removes phantoms that already exist or appear through non-standard methods.

**What that means:**
- No surprise phantoms after restarts
- No phantoms loaded from chunks
- No phantoms spawned by commands or other plugins
- No edge cases slipping through

Once installed, phantoms are gone for good.

---

## Features
- Completely prevents phantom spawning
- Instantly removes any phantoms that appear
- Purges phantoms on chunk load
- Optional periodic global phantom cleanup
- Optional startup purge on server boot
- Reload command: `/phantomerase reload`
- Configurable settings with ignored worlds support

---

## Compatibility
Tested on **Paper 1.21**.

Designed to work on:
- Paper
- Purpur
- Spigot
- Bukkit
- Folia

---

## Configuration
DeletePhantoms works out of the box with no setup required.

Optional settings allow you to:
- Exclude specific worlds
- Enable or disable periodic cleanup
- Control startup purge behavior

---

## Support
For help, bug reports, or suggestions, you can join the **discord.**
---

> **Note:**  
> DeletePhantoms is intentionally minimal.  
> It does not modify gameplay mechanics or add new systems.  
> It simply ensures phantoms never exist on your server.
